nonGoals: Do NOT change any provider ID strings in source code
Do NOT modify apps/web/src/lib/providers.ts
Do NOT alter API endpoints or data files
Do NOT add provider registration logic
objective: Author docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md listing all 26 canonical provider IDs from apps/web/src/lib/providers.ts, declaring them stable, and specifying a deprecation policy (renames get a one-release dual-ID window, announced in CHANGELOG)
planText: Create docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md with three sections: (1) Canonical Provider IDs — a markdown table of all 26 providers (id, name, type) sourced from the DEFAULT_PROVIDERS array in apps/web/src/lib/providers.ts, (2) Stability Guarantees — provider IDs are stable, will not be removed without a deprecation window, consumers can rely on them as opaque string keys, (3) Deprecation Policy — renames are served under both old and new IDs for one release cycle, all renames/deprecations are announced in CHANGELOG.md before removal. Document is purely additive and requires no code changes.

nonGoals: Do NOT change runtime behavior or API responses
Do NOT add new source files or packages
Do NOT modify apps/web/src/lib/types.ts
Do NOT change how types are consumed by the web app
objective: Update packages/sdk/src/types.ts: expand ProviderId union type from 9 cloud-only providers to all 26 canonical providers, and add generatedAt + optional contentHash fields to the VoiceCatalog type
planText: In packages/sdk/src/types.ts: (a) Extend the existing ProviderId string union from the current 9 cloud providers to all 26 canonical IDs (aws-polly, azure-speech, gcp-tts, elevenlabs, openai, gemini-tts, deepgram, cartesia, lmnt, edge-tts, kokoro, qwen3-tts, dia, bark, kittentts, marvis, vibevoice, orpheus, soprano, pocket-tts, spark-tts, chatterbox, chatterbox-turbo, outetts, voxcpm, huggingface). (b) Add generatedAt (ISO 8601 string) and contentHash (optional SHA-256 hex string) fields to the VoiceCatalog interface so downstream consumers can detect drift. Verify with npm run test (which includes typecheck).

nonGoals: Do NOT change voice entry data or provider data
Do NOT modify the Lambda endpoint (handled in next deliverable)
Do NOT alter artifact output paths or filenames
Do NOT change the check-catalog-fresh.mjs CI guard logic
Do NOT introduce new runtime dependencies beyond Node.js crypto
objective: Add generatedAt and contentHash version stamp to apps/web/static/data/voices.json and extend scripts/publish-catalog.mjs to compute and inject consistent stamps into all catalog artifacts
planText: In scripts/publish-catalog.mjs: (a) After reading voices.json, compute a SHA-256 content hash of the canonical JSON-sorted voices array (use Node.js crypto.createHash('sha256')). (b) Set a shared CATALOG_VERSION object { generatedAt: ISO timestamp, contentHash: hex digest }. (c) When writing back to apps/web/static/data/voices.json (the --from-db path already writes; extend to also write-back in local mode), inject { generatedAt, contentHash } as top-level fields alongside the voices array. (d) Ensure the existing static API artifact generation (static/api/v1/voices.json, static/api/v1/providers.json) also carries these fields — replacing the current generatedAt-only stamp with the full CATALOG_VERSION object. (e) Verify with npm run build:web that stamped artifacts are valid JSON and with npm run test.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify static files or publish-catalog.mjs
Do NOT change voice querying, filtering, or pagination logic
Do NOT alter the Lambda handler signature or route registration
Do NOT add contentHash to the Lambda response (generatedAt only, matching scope of static artifact parity)
objective: Add generatedAt field to the live GET /v1/voices Lambda response in infra/functions/synthesis-router/lib/voices.mjs so the live endpoint matches the static /api/v1/voices.json shape
planText: In infra/functions/synthesis-router/lib/voices.mjs: the queryVoices() function currently returns { voices, total, limit, offset }. Read the generatedAt stamp from the source-of-truth data/voices.json (already loaded by the function) and include it in the return object as { voices, total, limit, offset, generatedAt }. If voices.json carries contentHash, it can be included too but the minimum is generatedAt. Ensure the synthesis-router route handler that calls queryVoices() passes the field through unchanged. This aligns the live API surface with the static /api/v1/voices.json artifact. Verify with npm run test.

nonGoals: Do NOT modify any source code or data files
Do NOT change docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md
Do NOT record historical changes prior to this issue
objective: Create CHANGELOG.md recording the provider-id stability contract introduction and version-stamp addition for consumer drift detection
planText: Create CHANGELOG.md at the repo root with a single entry under today's date: (1) Added docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md — stability contract for all 26 provider IDs with deprecation policy (old IDs served alongside new IDs for one release cycle, announced here). (2) Added version stamps (generatedAt + contentHash) to /data/voices.json, static /api/v1/voices.json, static /api/v1/providers.json, and the live /v1/voices endpoint — consumers can cheaply detect catalog drift by comparing stamps. Include a brief note that future provider-id changes will be logged here per the deprecation policy.
